What is bitcoin

New Currency Bitcoin

Globaltradexplus was founded in 2016 with the vision of opening up the global markets so that anyone can trade and invest in a simple and transparent way.

Globaltradexplus offers an array of investment products. Our primary focus has been on emerging and rapid growth markets with an emphasis on forex, stock and other top performing crypto currencies. We are proud to work to the highest ethical standards of trading strategies. We are pleased to offer some of the most dynamic and high-performing trading strategies available. We have become well known in our industry and we are well respected by our peers. We are excited to serve our national and international clients. Our network in growing fast and is far reaching.

Read More Contact us
New levels of security

Why Choose Globaltradexplus

Building trust is important and to ensure you know you are protected, Globaltradexplus has employed regulation and state-of-the-art technology for you to trade with confidence.

PROFITABLE INVESTMENT

Watch your profit grow daily as soon as you make deposit into your trading account.

REGULATION & FUNDS

As a regulated broker under (FCA and SEC) we must maintain high levels of capitalization, transparency and reporting.

DEPTH OF PROTECTION

Trader protection is our absolute priority. We implement some of the most modern protocols for protecting funds. No compromise.

Multi-Asset Platform

Trade Stocks, Commodities and Forex with endless trading opportunities.

SECURITY COMES FIRST

We use DDOS attack prevention, and Secure Socket Layer encryption in order to protect our assets and our client data.

FAST PAYMENTS

Our Deposits and withdrawals are all processed instantly after they are requested. Note:For urgency use Bitcoin method .

Cryptocurrency Prices by Coinlib
Our culture defines itself through our people and the three core values that they embody.

We are Globaltradexplus

Customer First

We start with a focus on customers where specialised expertise, attention to detail, and follow through are seen as important aspects to all of our interactions.

Integrity

We do what is right for our customers, partners, employees, and all other stakeholders.

Agility

Our people are agile and thrive in changing industry trends, business conditions, and demands by customers. Past experiences and newly acquired skills provide the confidence to forge ahead.

Three steps to start making profit

How It Works

Start your financial journey with ease

1

Register

Create and verify your trading account to complete our KYC process

2

Fund

Make deposit into the company designated wallet address to activate your account.

3

Start Earning

Watch your investment grow and make withdrawal at end of your trading cycle.

Globaltradexplus

AWESOME FACTS

Openness and transparency are an integral part of the user experience on Globaltradexplus. Whether it’s the ability to start a chat with our support service or the fact that we don’t charge any hidden fees and make sure our prices are clear and visible, we strive to make sure that our users feel that they have all the information they need to handle their finances on Globaltradexplus.

What our clients say

Testimonials

"Premium company"

24/7 customer service
You can talk to a human agent. They are quick to respond to any questions or concerns. Clients are treated in a very personal but professional way. Deposits and withdrawals are done instantly. Partners' and Masterpartners' commissions are always paid on time with a very simple transaction.


Andre Guzman
Customer

"Trustable broker"

As a client/ trader i can certainly recommend Globaltradexplus. They have been around for a year just celebrating their 1st birthday and growing at a fast pace.

As far as i know they are the only broker out there you can actually invest in. Earn passive income and trade FX - a nice combination.


Miri Kedem
Customer

"Despite being a "young" broker est."

Despite being a "young" broker est. 2016, even a superficial due diligence reveals that they are earnest in making a place in the market for themselves on the basis of an excellent data feed, superb client relationships, the option of earning 100% passive income through a crypto-related deposit and last but not least VIP trading accounts that do away with commissions. Client and trading growth curves are good evidence of that. The icing on the cake is that, with 10000$ in your account you qualify for outstanding 1-on-1 trading training! I've been a client since Sept. 19 and they have become my primary broker in a short time. Give them a try.


Madeline Khor
Customer

Innovating. Reinventing. Disrupting.

At Globaltradexplus, we have been continuously transforming the traditional money management industry, in order to open the financial markets to everyone, everywhere.

Contact Us

About Company

Globaltradexplus

At Globaltradexplus we get you connected to the best trading platform available on the market and from that point on your success is our success. Each profitable trade gets you up to 85% profit, while we receive our commission. Totally a win-win situation.
